problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.
